itinerary.title: No itinerary yet
itinerary.description: Generate a day-by-day plan from your route, preferences, budget, and travel dates.

route.title: No route yet
route.description: Add stops to plan a multi-destination trip, or keep this as a single-destination trip.

transport.title: No transport selected
transport.description: Search transport options so timing and budget estimates become more accurate.

budget.title: No budget set
budget.description: Set a trip budget to track estimated and actual spending.
budget.viewerDescription: No budget has been set. Ask an editor to add one.

expenses.title: No expenses yet
expenses.description: Add actual expenses during or after the trip to compare planned and actual spending.
expenses.viewerDescription: No expenses have been added yet.

receipts.title: No receipts uploaded
receipts.description: Upload receipts to keep proof of spending and create expenses faster.

checklist.title: No checklist yet
checklist.description: Generate a packing and preparation checklist from your itinerary, weather, route, and transport.
checklist.viewerDescription: No checklist yet. Ask an editor to generate one.

reminders.title: No reminders yet
reminders.description: Create pre-trip reminders for documents, transport, packing, and important deadlines.

collaborators.title: No collaborators yet
collaborators.description: Invite friends or teammates to plan this trip together.

polls.title: No group decisions yet
polls.description: Create a poll to choose dates, routes, activities, or transport options together.

comments.title: No comments yet
comments.description: Start a conversation about this trip or itinerary item.

activity.title: No activity yet
activity.description: Trip changes and collaboration activity will appear here.

health.title: Trip looks good
health.description: No critical trip health issues were found. Review the itinerary before travel.

groupReadiness.title: Everyone looks ready
groupReadiness.description: No group readiness issues need attention right now.

offline.title: No offline trips yet
offline.description: Open a trip while online to make its saved details available offline.

templates.title: No templates yet
templates.description: Save a completed trip as a template or start by creating a trip you can reuse later.

workspaces.title: No workspaces yet
workspaces.description: Create a workspace when you want to plan trips with a team.

workspaceTrips.title: No workspace trips yet
workspaceTrips.description: Create or move a trip into this workspace to collaborate.

unsaved.title: Discard unsaved changes?
unsaved.description: Your changes on this screen will be lost. Saved trip data will not be affected.

restoreVersion.title: Restore this itinerary version?
restoreVersion.description: This will replace your current itinerary and create a new version. Comments, expenses, receipts, and collaborators will not be deleted.

disableShare.title: Disable public share link?
disableShare.description: Anyone with the current link will lose access immediately. You can create a new link later.

deleteReceipt.title: Delete this receipt?
deleteReceipt.description: This removes the receipt file from this trip. The linked expense will not be deleted unless you delete it separately.

deleteExpense.title: Delete this expense?
deleteExpense.description: This removes the expense from trip totals. Attached receipt files will remain available.

clearOffline.title: Clear offline trip data?
clearOffline.description: This removes cached trips and pending offline drafts from this device. Synced cloud data will not be deleted.

forms.endDateAfterStart: End date must be after start date.
forms.currencyCode: Currency must be a 3-letter code, such as EUR.
forms.requiredHint: Required fields are marked as required.

publicShare.expiredDescription: Ask the trip owner to create a new share link.
publicShare.unavailableDescription: This shared trip is unavailable or has been disabled.
publicShare.wrongPassword: That password did not work. Check it and try again.
publicShare.noItineraryDescription: The trip owner has not created an itinerary for this shared trip.
publicShare.disclaimer: This is a read-only shared view. Estimates are approximate—verify prices, hours, and availability before booking.
publicShare.passwordTitle: This shared trip is password protected
publicShare.passwordDescription: Enter the password to view the itinerary.

generationQuality.jobRunningStages: Generating, validating, repairing if needed, and saving your itinerary.
generationQuality.preferencesUsed: Your saved travel preferences will be used to generate this itinerary.

transport.staleWarning: Transport option may no longer match this leg.

auth.tagline: Every great trip starts with a single idea.
auth.taglineDescription: Plan smarter with AI-drafted itineraries you can shape into your own.
auth.registerDescription: Start planning your next trip in minutes.
auth.loginDescription: Log in to pick up where you left off.
auth.loginFailed: We could not log you in. Check your email and password, then try again.
auth.registerFailed: We could not create your account. Review the details and try again.

settings.title: Profile & preferences
settings.description: The details used to personalize your AI-generated itineraries.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the language used by the app and new AI-generated plans.
settings.languageUpdateFailed: The app language changed on this device, but the profile could not be updated.
settings.loadErrorTitle: We could not load your settings
settings.loadFailed: Your saved settings are unchanged. Check your connection and try again.
settings.preferencesSaveFailed: Could not save preferences. Your previous settings are unchanged.

onboarding.title: Getting started
onboarding.description: Manage first-run guidance and contextual tips on this device.

trips.title: Your trips
trips.createDescription: Set the essentials — the AI drafts a full day-by-day itinerary you can refine.

budgets.currencyHint: Use a 3-letter currency code, such as EUR or USD.

expenses.title: Shared expenses
expenses.subtitle: Track actual trip spending, split costs, and settle balances.
expenses.offline: Actual expenses are available when this private trip is online.
expenses.empty: No actual expenses have been added yet.
expenses.disclaimer: Settlements are suggestions only. No payment is initiated or processed.

receipts.confirmBeforeCreate: Review extracted data before creating an expense. No expense is created until you confirm.
receipts.attachDescription: Upload a new receipt for this expense or attach an unlinked receipt.
receipts.supportedFiles: JPG, PNG, WebP, or PDF, up to {maxSize} MB.
receipts.privacyNotice: Receipts may contain personal or payment details. Review the file before uploading and only share what this trip needs.
receipts.createdFromReceiptNote: Created from receipt OCR. Verify the extracted fields.
receipts.createExpenseFailed: Could not create expense from receipt.

settlements.title: Settlements
settlements.subtitle: Simplified suggestions based on paid expenses and recorded settlements.

notifications.workspaceInvited: You were invited to a workspace
notifications.tripSubmittedForApproval: A trip was submitted for approval

checklist.title: Packing & preparation checklist
checklist.description: Generate practical packing and preparation items from the itinerary, route, weather, and trip context.
checklist.onlineOnly: Checklist tools are available when this private trip is online.
checklist.instructionsPlaceholder: Optional focus, e.g. light packing, camping, or documents
checklist.emptyEditable: No checklist yet. Generate one or add the first item.
checklist.emptyReadonly: No checklist has been shared for this trip yet.
checklist.noFilterResults: No checklist items match these filters.

tripReminders.title: Reminders & preparation timeline
tripReminders.description: Plan preparation tasks from checklist items, route, weather, accommodation, and collaborators.
tripReminders.onlineOnly: Reminder tools are available when this private trip is online.
tripReminders.emptyEditable: No reminders yet. Generate a timeline or add the first reminder.
tripReminders.emptyReadonly: No reminders have been shared for this trip yet.
tripReminders.staleWarning: Reminder timeline may be outdated because trip dates, route, or checklist changed.
tripReminders.officialWarning: Generated reminders are preparation aids. Verify official requirements yourself.
tripReminders.instructionsPlaceholder: Optional focus, e.g. rainy weather, hiking gear, or tickets

tripDecisions.onlineRequired: You need to be online to vote

exports.costEstimateDisclaimer: Costs are estimates and may change.
exports.accountingDisclaimer: This is not an accounting or payment record.

offline.clearFailed: Offline data could not be cleared. Try again.
offline.banner: You are offline. You can view cached trip details and edit supported offline items.
offline.changesPending: These changes will sync when you are back online.
offline.otherUserDraft: This draft belongs to another signed-in user and will not be synced.

tripDiscovery.knownDestination: I know where I want to go
tripDiscovery.knownDestinationHint: Create a trip with the destination form
tripDiscovery.pageDescription: Describe the feeling, budget, or pace you want. We’ll turn it into destinations worth considering.
tripDiscovery.heroSubtitle: Describe your ideal trip, or let AI surprise you based on your preferences and past trips.
tripDiscovery.promptLabel: What would make this trip feel right?
tripDiscovery.promptPlaceholder: E.g. A cheap 3-day trip with warm weather, good food, and not too much walking…
tripDiscovery.tripDetails: Add budget, duration, origin, or workspace
tripDiscovery.findingPlaces: Finding places that fit your travel style…
tripDiscovery.matchTooltip: Estimated fit based on your prompt, preferences, and past trips.
tripDiscovery.emptyBody: Try changing the budget, duration, or the way you describe your trip.
tripDiscovery.refineSubtitle: Tell us what feels off. Your next shortlist will adapt.
tripDiscovery.confirmDescription: Review the details before creating anything. Surprise Me never creates a trip automatically.
tripDiscovery.title: Trip title
tripDiscovery.autoGenerateHint: Create the draft and immediately queue an AI itinerary.
tripDiscovery.budgetDisclaimer: Estimated budgets are rough and do not include live flight or hotel prices. No booking is performed.
tripDiscovery.createError: Could not create the trip from this suggestion.
tripDiscovery.errorBody: Try again or adjust your prompt. No trip was created.

refineInstructions.lessWalking: Prioritize destinations that need less walking.
refineInstructions.similarPlaces: Show similar places, but not the same destination.
refineInstructions.betterFood: Prioritize destinations with excellent local food.
refineInstructions.betterMuseums: Prioritize destinations with strong museums and culture.
refineInstructions.notThisVibe: This suggestion is not the right vibe. Replace it with something meaningfully different.

planningConstraints.title: AI planning summary
planningConstraints.emptyPreview: Preview the settings that AI will use.

routeAlternatives.title: Compare routes
routeAlternatives.approximateWarning: Estimates are approximate and do not include live ticket prices.

tripAvailability.title: Dates
tripAvailability.offline: You need to be online to update availability.
tripAvailability.markFullyBusyDaysUnavailable: Mark fully busy days as unavailable
tripAvailability.markPartiallyBusyDaysUnavailable: Mark partially busy days as unavailable
tripAvailability.suggestFreeWeekendsAsPreferredDates: Suggest free weekends as preferred dates

dateOptions.conflictWarning: This date option may conflict with some collaborators.

groupReadiness.title: Group readiness
groupReadiness.avoidSpam: To avoid spam, reminders are limited.

route.builderDescription: See every stop, transfer, selected service, and itinerary warning in one place.
route.itineraryItemCount: {count, plural, one {# itinerary item} other {# itinerary items}}
route.transferDayCount: {count, plural, one {# transfer day} other {# transfer days}}
route.noRouteDescription: Create a route to connect destinations and transport.
route.dragOrButtonsHint: Drag, or use the arrow buttons for keyboard ordering.
route.impactPreviewDescription: Review the connected trip data that will need attention after this route is saved.
route.impactRemoveTransport: remove {count, plural, one {# selected transport option} other {# selected transport options}}
route.impactStaleTransport: mark {count, plural, one {# transport option} other {# transport options}} as potentially stale
route.impactItinerary: mark the itinerary as potentially stale
route.impactHealth: may change the Trip Health score
route.issueCount: {count, plural, one {# issue needs attention} other {# issues need attention}}
route.validationAdvisory: Route checks are advisory. Always verify travel times, schedules, and prices.
route.lowConfidenceLegCount: {count, plural, one {# leg has low-confidence or estimated transport} other {# legs have low-confidence or estimated transport}}.
route.offlineEditingDisabled: Route editing and transport search require internet. Cached route and selected transport remain available read-only.
route.resolveValidationBeforeSaving: Resolve the structural route issues before saving.
route.routeConflict: This itinerary changed elsewhere. Refresh the trip and review the route again.
route.saveBeforeTransportSearch: Save or discard the route draft before searching transport.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.tripLoadTitle: We could not load this trip
errors.tripLoadDescription: Your trip data is safe. Check your connection and try again.
errors.tripHealthDescription: We could not check this trip right now. The rest of your trip is still available.
errors.groupReadinessDescription: We could not calculate group readiness right now. Try again in a moment.
errors.budgetConfidenceDescription: We could not check the estimate quality. Your saved budget is unchanged.
errors.itineraryGenerationTitle: We could not generate this itinerary
errors.itineraryGenerationDescription: The AI output could not be validated against your route and trip constraints.
errors.transportTitle: We could not load transport options
errors.transportDescription: Your route is still saved. Try again in a moment or use an estimated transport option.
errors.currencyDescription: Some totals may be shown in their original currency until conversion works again.
errors.receiptUploadDescription: Check the file type and size, then try again. Supported files are JPG, PNG, WebP, and PDF.
errors.offlineSyncDescription: Your local changes are still saved on this device. Resolve the conflict before syncing again.
errors.permissionTitle: You do not have access to this action
errors.permissionDescription: Your current role does not allow this change.
errors.calendarDescription: We could not connect your calendar. Check permissions and try again.
errors.deepLinkMissing: The linked item could not be found. It may have been removed or changed.
errors.checklistLoadTitle: We could not load the checklist
errors.checklistLoadDescription: Your trip is still available. Try loading the checklist again.
errors.offlineTripsTitle: We could not load offline trips
errors.offlineTripsDescription: Your saved trip data is still on this device. Try loading it again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to do that.
errors.notFound: The requested item could not be found.
errors.validationError: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.itineraryConflict: This itinerary changed elsewhere. Refresh and try again.
errors.editLockConflict: Someone else is currently editing this trip.
errors.workspacePolicyBlockingViolation: This change is blocked by workspace policy.
errors.providerRateLimited: The provider is busy. Try again shortly.
errors.providerQuotaExceeded: The provider quota has been reached.
errors.aiGenerationFailed: The itinerary could not be generated.
errors.repairProposalConflict: This repair proposal is based on an older itinerary.

tripHealth.routeItineraryMismatch: Route and itinerary do not match

onboarding.pageDescription: Set useful defaults, choose the planning path that fits, and create your first trip at your own pace.

loadError.title: We could not load your preferences
loadError.description: Your existing settings are unchanged. You can retry without losing progress.

welcome.title: Plan a useful first trip in a few minutes
welcome.description: Tell us a few optional preferences or go straight to the planning flow that matches what you already know.

firstRun.title: Plan your first trip
firstRun.description: Start with a destination, let AI suggest ideas, use a template, or build a multi-city route.

demo.title: Explore a demo trip
demo.description: See how a completed trip looks.
demo.bestFor: Best for a quick product tour

chooseStart.title: How would you like to start?
chooseStart.description: Each option opens an existing planning flow, so you can switch paths at any time.

known.title: I know where I want to go
known.description: Best if you already know where and when you want to travel. Add the essentials and create a draft.
known.shortDescription: Create a trip when you know the destination and dates.

discovery.title: Help me choose a destination
discovery.description: Best if you know the vibe but not the destination. Describe what you want and compare suggestions.
discovery.shortDescription: Describe the trip vibe and compare AI suggestions.

template.title: Start from a template
template.description: Reuse a proven itinerary structure and adapt it to a new destination.
template.shortDescription: Start from a reusable itinerary template.

route.title: Create a multi-destination route
route.description: Plan multiple cities, towns, or stops and connect them with transport.
route.shortDescription: Plan several cities or stops in one trip.

preferences.saveFailed: Could not save preferences. You can continue and try again later.

basics.title: The basics
basics.description: These defaults make new trip forms faster to complete.

style.title: Your travel style
style.description: Choose any themes you often enjoy. You can change them for each trip.

comfort.title: Comfort and pace
comfort.description: Help the planner avoid days that are too packed, expensive, or walk-heavy.

details.title: Food, transport, and stays
details.description: Optional preferences make suggestions more relevant from the first draft.

validation.language: Choose English, Spanish, Ukrainian, or French.
validation.walking: Enter a walking limit between 0.5 and 50 km.

setup.title: Finish the useful details
setup.description: Your trip Command Center now shows a short setup checklist. Use it to add an itinerary, budget, route, packing checklist, and final health review.

status.description: You can still use any starting option or restart the preference setup.

setupChecklist.title: Set up your trip
setupChecklist.description: Complete the useful details in any order.

tips.title: Good to know
tips.tripHealth: Trip Health tells you what is missing before travel.
tips.budgetConfidence: Budget confidence shows how trustworthy your estimate is based on cost sources.
tips.routeTransport: Selected transport helps timing and budget, but it is not a booking confirmation.
tips.publicShare: Public share links are read-only and do not include private expenses or receipts.
tips.offlineMode: Offline mode stores selected trip data on this device. Clear it on shared devices.
tips.receipts: Receipts may contain sensitive information. Upload only files you want stored with this trip.
tips.aiGeneration: AI plans are validated before saving, but you should still review important details.

demo.privacy: It uses sample data and never saves changes or exposes private information.
demo.tripTitle: A long weekend in Bratislava and Vienna
demo.itineraryDescription: A balanced first day with travel time and costs reviewed.
demo.healthNoticeDescription: Add the return train time before travel so the final day remains realistic.
demo.budgetNoticeDescription: Most major items have prices; meals still use regional estimates.

sample.breakfastDetail: Local bakery and coffee near the old town.
sample.walkDetail: A relaxed route through historic streets and small courtyards.
sample.castleDetail: Panoramic city views with time to explore at your own pace.

validation.invalidCurrency: Enter a valid three-letter currency code.

commandPalette.title: Search and commands
commandPalette.placeholder: Search trips, route stops, expenses, receipts, settings...
commandPalette.footer: Use arrows to move, Enter to open, Esc to close.

empty.shortDescription: Enter at least two characters to search private trip data.
empty.title: No results found
empty.description: Try a trip destination, stop name, expense title, receipt filename, checklist item, reminder, template, or setting.

disabled.editTrip: You do not have edit access for this trip.

createTrip.title: Create new trip
createTrip.description: Start a new AI travel plan.

travelDay.title: Open Travel Day Mode
travelDay.description: See what is happening today and what is next.

routeTransport.title: Open Route & Transport
routeTransport.description: Review stops, legs, and transport choices.

uploadReceipt.title: Upload receipt
uploadReceipt.description: Attach a receipt to this trip.

offlineTrips.title: Open offline trips
offlineTrips.description: Review trips saved on this device.

gettingStarted.title: Getting started
gettingStarted.description: Open the first-run guide and planning choices.

createFirstTrip.title: Create first trip
createFirstTrip.description: Start with a destination and dates.

copilot.title: Travel Assistant
copilot.subtitle: Ask about this trip
copilot.promptHealth: Why is my Trip Health low?
copilot.promptBudget: How can I improve Budget Confidence?
copilot.promptGroup: Who still needs to do something?
copilot.promptShare: How do I share this trip?
copilot.promptReceipt: Where do I upload a receipt?
copilot.disclaimer: Copilot uses your trip summaries and settings to answer. It cannot make changes automatically.
copilot.unavailableDescription: You can still use Trip Health and Command Center to review next steps.

travelDay.staleNotice: Travel times and verification may be stale.
travelDay.notBooking: This is not a booking confirmation

verification.disclaimer: Provider checks, manual confirmations, and estimates are shown separately. This is not a booking confirmation.
verification.refreshFailed: Verification could not be refreshed. Try again later.
verification.allCurrent: Key trip assumptions have current verification data.
